folio.label: 29v
folio.l: Of Emelie , and dye in thy seruyse
Fynde æè the maner , && in what wyse
I recche nat , but it may better be
To han victorie , of hem , or they of me
So that I haue my lady , in myne armes
For thougú so be , that Mars is god of armes
ñoure vertu is so gret , in heuene a boue
That if ©ow list , I shal wel haue my loue
Thy temple wol I worshipe , euäe mo
And on thyn auter , where I ride or go
I wyl don sacrifise , and fires bete
And if ©e wyl nat so , my lady swete
Than preye I the , to morwe with a spere
That Arcita me , thorugh æe hert bere
Than rekke I nougút , whan I haue lost my lif´
Though æ Arcita , wynne hire to his wyf
This is the effect , and ende of my preyere
ñeue me mymy lyf , æè blisseful lady dere
¢ Whan æat the orison , was don of Palamou~
His sacrifice he dide , and that a nou
Ful pitously , with alle the circumstauncez
Alle telle i nat , as now , his obseruauncez
But at the laste , the stature of venus shoke
And made a signe , wher by æ he toke
That his prayer , accepted was that day
For thougú the xx xx signe , shewed a delay

note.notetxt: 1340 I think that the xx could be is: double check.ODR

folio.l: ñet wist he wele , that gunted was his bone
And with glad herte , he went hi~ hom ful sone
The thridde houre , in equaÂ æ Palamouö
Began to venus temple , for to gon
Vp ros the so~ne , and vp ros Emelye
And to the temple of Diane , gan hye
Hire maydenes , æ she thidder w hire ladde
Ful redily w hem , the fyr they hadde
The encence , the clothes , and the remenau~t alle
That to the Sacrefice , longen shalle
The hornes ful of mede , as was the gyse
There lakked nou©t , to don hire sacrefise
Smokyng the temple , ful of clothes faire
This Emelye , with herte debonaire
Hir body vessú , with water of a welle
But how she dide , hir rite , I dar nat telle
But it be ony thyng , in general
